_doc: THE AWAY-DAY MANIFEST (CYBORG_BRAIN.md §9) — the ONLY jobs a cloud runner may execute. Every job MUST carry public_safe:true; scripts/awayday.mjs refuses the whole run if even one lacks it. Selftests are public-safe by design: every suite is dormant-safe and reads zero personal data (personal files are gitignored and absent in a cloud checkout anyway — this flag is the second lock).
